'''âv-f-y''' ('''kavafay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lustrify|lustrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lustrify|lustrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-f-y
|-
! Lemma
| kavafay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivafay|thivafay]] || [[word:jivafay|jivafay]] || [[word:shivafay|shivafay]] || [[word:kivafay|kivafay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvafay|thuthuvafay]] || [[word:jujuvafay|jujuvafay]] || [[word:shushuvafay|shushuvafay]] || [[word:kukuvafay|kukuvafay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvafay|thuvafay]] || [[word:juvafay|juvafay]] || [[word:shuvafay|shuvafay]] || [[word:kuvafay|kuvafay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvafay|thuvafay]] || [[word:juvafay|juvafay]] || [[word:shuvafay|shuvafay]] || [[word:kuvafay|kuvafay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevafay|thevafay]] || [[word:jevafay|jevafay]] || [[word:shevafay|shevafay]] || [[word:kevafay|kevafay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovafay|thothovafay]] || [[word:jojovafay|jojovafay]] || [[word:shoshovafay|shoshovafay]] || [[word:kokovafay|kokovafay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovafay|thovafay]] || [[word:jovafay|jovafay]] || [[word:shovafay|shovafay]] || [[word:kovafay|kovafay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovafay|thovafay]] || [[word:jovafay|jovafay]] || [[word:shovafay|shovafay]] || [[word:kovafay|kovafay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvafay|thĂŠvafay]] || [[word:jĂŠvafay|jĂŠvafay]] || [[word:shĂŠvafay|shĂŠvafay]] || [[word:kĂŠvafay|kĂŠvafay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavafay|thathavafay]] || [[word:jajavafay|jajavafay]] || [[word:shashavafay|shashavafay]] || [[word:kakavafay|kakavafay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavafay|thavafay]] || [[word:javafay|javafay]] || [[word:shavafay|shavafay]] || [[word:kavafay|kavafay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavafay|thavafay]] || [[word:javafay|javafay]] || [[word:shavafay|shavafay]] || [[word:kavafay|kavafay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavafay|shavafay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavafay|goshavafay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavafay|gokishavafay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavafaynĂŒ|shavafaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavafaynknĂŒ|goshavafaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafaynĂŒ|gokishavafaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavafayshĂ«|shavafayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavafaynkshĂ«|goshavafaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavafayshĂ«|gokishavafayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafayro|shavafayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafaynkro|goshavafaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafayro|gokishavafayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafaymu|shavafaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafaynkmu|goshavafaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafaymu|gokishavafaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavafaysher|shavafaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavafaynksher|goshavafaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavafaysher|gokishavafaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavafayng|shavafayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavafaynkng|goshavafaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavafayng|gokishavafayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavafaya|shavafaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavafaynkya|goshavafaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavafaya|gokishavafaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavafayam|shavafayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavafaynkyam|goshavafaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavafayam|gokishavafayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafaynĂŒshĂ«|shavafaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshavafaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishavafaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafaynĂŒro|shavafaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafaynknĂŒro|goshavafaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafaynĂŒro|gokishavafaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafaynĂŒmu|shavafaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafaynknĂŒmu|goshavafaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafaynĂŒmu|gokishavafaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafayshĂ«nĂŒ|shavafayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavafaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavafayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafayshĂ«ro|shavafayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafaynkshĂ«ro|goshavafaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafayshĂ«ro|gokishavafayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafayshĂ«mu|shavafayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafaynkshĂ«mu|goshavafaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafayshĂ«mu|gokishavafayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafayronĂŒ|shavafayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafaynkronĂŒ|goshavafaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafayronĂŒ|gokishavafayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafayroshĂ«|shavafayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafaynkroshĂ«|goshavafaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafayroshĂ«|gokishavafayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafayromu|shavafayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafaynkromu|goshavafaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafayromu|gokishavafayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafaymunĂŒ|shavafaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafaynkmunĂŒ|goshavafaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafaymunĂŒ|gokishavafaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafaymushĂ«|shavafaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafaynkmushĂ«|goshavafaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafaymushĂ«|gokishavafaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafaymuro|shavafaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafaynkmuro|goshavafaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafaymuro|gokishavafaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a27364f}}
